query:
INSERT INTO schedule (
                workspace_id, path, schedule, timezone, edited_by, script_path,
                is_flow, enabled, email, permissioned_as, summary, tag, cron_version
            ) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'Etc/UTC', $4, $2, false, true, $5, $6, $7, 'duckdb', 'v2')
            ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, path) DO UPDATE SET
                schedule = EXCLUDED.schedule,
                timezone = EXCLUDED.timezone,
                edited_by = EXCLUDED.edited_by,
                edited_at = now(),
                script_path = EXCLUDED.script_path,
                is_flow = false,
                enabled = true,
                email = EXCLUDED.email,
                permissioned_as = EXCLUDED.permissioned_as,
                summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
                tag = EXCLUDED.tag,
                cron_version = EXCLUDED.cron_version,
                error = NULL
